remarks: Move right in to this rental in Old Greenwich Gables! This two-bedroom unit is on the main level with completely renovated kitchen and two full bathrooms. Peaceful setting overlooking the fountain with tons of natural light. Access to swimming pool, squash court, gym and clubhouse. Amazing location close to the train, schools, restaurants and shopping.
